title: Namibian hake stock assessments
text: repository contains annual Namibian hake stock assessment, data control files, model diagnostics, code needed reproduce results.

title: Namibian hake stock assessments
text: 2025--2026 input-difference report identifies every intended input change. Model diagnostics key results available reports directory.

title: Namibian hake stock assessments
text: repository root, run four numbered workflow scripts order: stages validate compare annual inputs, compile run ADMB models, classify convergence, write compact CSV summaries, render HTML PDF reports. main machine-readable outputs : reports/input_changes_2025_to_2026.html reports/model_diagnostics_2026.csv reports/key_results_2026.csv vignettes/02-Namibian_hake_model_2026.html vignettes/02-Namibian_hake_model_2026.pdf dome-shaped selectivity steepness 0.5 sensitivities currently fail declared diagnostic criteria. estimates retained troubleshooting excluded inference. exact 2025 reference state, use immutable baseline-2025 tag.
code: Rscript scripts/01_validate_inputs.R Rscript scripts/02_run_assessment.R Rscript scripts/03_check_models.R Rscript scripts/04_render_report.R

title: Plot Age Fit — PlotAgeFit
text: function creates plot comparing observed predicted age compositions specified type.

title: Plot Age Fit — PlotAgeFit
code: PlotAgeFit(x = bc, title = NULL, type = "fishery", fage = 2, lage = 7)

title: Plot Age Fit — PlotAgeFit
text: x list containing observed predicted age compositions. Default bc. title character string plot title. Default NULL. type character string specifying type composition plot. Default "fishery". fage integer specifying first age include plot. Default 2. lage integer specifying last age include plot. Default 7.

title: Plot Age Fit — PlotAgeFit
text: ggplot object comparing observed predicted age compositions.

title: Plot Age Fit — PlotAgeFit
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ PlotAgeFit(x = bc, title = "Age Composition", type = "survey", fage = 1, lage = 8) } # }

title: Plot Selectivity — plot_sel
text: function creates plot selectivity across years ages.

title: Plot Selectivity — plot_sel
code: plot_sel(   Year = M$Year,   sel = M[, 2:10],   styr = 1964,   fage = NULL,   lage = NULL,   alpha = 0.2,   scale = 3.8,   fill = "purple" )

title: Plot Selectivity — plot_sel
text: Year vector years. Default M$Year. sel matrix selectivity values. Default M[,2:10]. styr integer specifying start year plot. Default 1964. fage integer specifying first age include plot. Default NULL. lage integer specifying last age include plot. Default NULL. alpha numeric value specifying transparency level fill. Default 0.2. scale numeric value specifying scale density ridges. Default 3.8. fill character string specifying fill color density ridges. Default "purple".

title: Plot Selectivity — plot_sel
text: ggplot object showing selectivity across years ages.

title: Plot Selectivity — plot_sel
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ plot_sel(Year = M$Year, sel = M[, 2:10], styr = 1970, fage = 1, lage = 8) } # }
